mundo.titulo: Three die in Royal Navy helicopter crash during training exercise
mundo.resumen: The Ministry of Defence says an investigation into the crash is under way.

mundo.titulo: PM accuses Farage of exploiting Nowak case and denies 'two-tier policing' claim
mundo.resumen: It comes after the Reform UK leader said the public should respond with "pure, cold rage" to the actions of police.

mundo.titulo: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg as Putin's flagship economic forum opens
mundo.resumen: Several long-range drones struck oil storage facilities near the city, days before Vladimir Putin is due to address the event.

mundo.titulo: One killed and dozens injured in Iranian drone strikes on Kuwait airport
mundo.resumen: Iran says the attack on Kuwait was in retaliation for earlier US strikes on an Iranian oil tanker and island.

mundo.titulo: How a content creator tried to use a YouTube alibi to get away with murder
mundo.resumen: Stephen McCullagh, 36, of Woodland Gardens in Lisburn, will serve at least 31 years in prison for the murder of his pregnant partner Natalie McNally.

mundo.titulo: The end of Trump's 'weaponisation' fund is another sign Republicans are fighting back
mundo.resumen: The $1.8bn fund would have paid people the Trump administration decided were unjustly and politically targeted.

negocios.titulo: US announces new tariffs over forced labour concerns
negocios.resumen: It comes after the US Supreme Court struck down many of US President Donald Trump's previous duties in February.

negocios.titulo: Three-quarters of workers not on track for 'moderate' pension income, report suggests
negocios.resumen: A newly-published report suggests a moderate lifestyle in retirement costs £32,700 for one person and £45,400 for two.

negocios.titulo: The 18 creatures in the running to be on the new banknotes
negocios.resumen: The Bank of England is asking the public which animals should appear on future banknotes.

negocios.titulo: Universal park officially named as government pledges £1.3bn
negocios.resumen: The government's contribution is going towards upgrading local infrastructure and transport links.

negocios.titulo: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland back after online banking outage
negocios.resumen: "We're aware some customers are having issues with our app and online banking. We're really sorry about this," Lloyds Bank posted on X.

negocios.titulo: How 'confused' AI rollout hurts firms and baffles staff
negocios.resumen: Some firms are putting pressure on staff to use AI, but have not thought through their AI rollout.

tecnologia.titulo: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
tecnologia.resumen: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

tecnologia.titulo: GitLab cuts 14% of staff as it scales its platform to serve AI workloads
tecnologia.resumen: The company is reducing its workforce as it exits 22 countries, reduces management layers, and invests in its infrastructure to scale its platform.

tecnologia.titulo: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
tecnologia.resumen: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the UK then rolled out globally.

tecnologia.titulo: TikTok launches TikTok Pro Events, an app for cultural moments like the FIFA World Cup
tecnologia.resumen: The app allows users to engage with other fans, explore trending videos, and access curated creator feeds.

tecnologia.titulo: The worst hacks and breaches of 2026 (so far)
tecnologia.resumen: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.

tecnologia.titulo: Meet Wander, a StumbleUpon-inspired tool for discovering the ‘small web’
tecnologia.resumen: This open-source community project lets you create a StumbleUpon-like experience for recommending your favorite sites.

A few months ago, Meta effectively handed Supernatural, a popular VR fitness game on the Meta Quest, a death sentence. tecnologia.resumen: Smart lighting company Nanoleaf has been acquired by OneRobotics, the parent company of SwitchBot. tecnologia.titulo: Trans teens have something to say
tecnologia.resumen: By the time the Children's Hospital closed its doors to trans patients, Sage had already stopped taking testosterone. A nonbinary high school student, they originally received treatment for the rapid onset of puberty. The changes their body experienced felt frightening and sudden.
